zh.Inchmahome, Stirlingshire, Scotland: 蘇格蘭斯林史爾音賀馬米
zh.lifeSummary: 當Sir Malcolm Drummond -Earl Of Mar於1347年出生在蘇格蘭培爾卡吉爾時，他的父親John Drummond29歲，母親Mary Margaret Montefichet17歲。他於1388年與Lady Isabell Douglas Countess of Mar在英國蘇格蘭結婚。他們至少是1個女兒的父母。他於1388年登記服兵役。他去世於1403年在蘇格蘭享年56歲，埋葬在蘇格蘭。

zh-hans.Inchmahome, Stirlingshire, Scotland: 苏格兰斯林史爾音賀馬米
zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Sir Malcolm Drummond -Earl Of Mar于1347年出生在苏格兰培爾卡吉爾时，他的父亲John Drummond29岁，母亲Mary Margaret Montefichet17岁。他于1388年与Lady Isabell Douglas Countess of Mar在英国苏格兰结婚。他们至少是1个女儿的父母。他于1388年登记服兵役。他去世于1403年在苏格兰享年56岁，埋葬在苏格兰。

nameMeanings.name: Drummond
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Scottish: habitational name from any of various places, notably the barony of Drummond, which is probably identical with the parish of Drymen (Stirlingshire), named from Gaelic drumainn, a derivative of druim ‘ridge’. It has been said that the principal family of this name are descended from a Hungarian nobleman, Maurice, who accompanied Edgar Atheling and his sister Margaret to Scotland in 1068, where she married King Malcolm III. However, there is disagreement on whether or not this was the case.

English: occasionally perhaps from an unrecorded Middle English personal name Dromund (Old Norse Drómundr, apparently from a word denoting a kind of Byzantine galley prevalent till the 12th cent., from Greek dromōn ‘runner’).

variants.name: Drummonds
meanings: Scottish: variant of Drummond , with post-medieval excrescent -s. In Britain this surname is found mainly in County Durham.

nameMeanings.name: Malcolm
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Anglicized form of the medieval Gaelic name Mael Coluim ‘devotee of St Columba’. Columba was a 6th-century monk of Irish origin who played a leading part in the conversion to Christianity of Scotland and northern England; see also Callum and Colm . He has always been one of the most popular saints in Scotland, but in the Middle Ages it was felt to be presumptuous to give the names of saints directly to children; instead their blessing was invoked by prefixing the name with mael ‘devotee of’ or gille ‘servant of’. Since the 1930s the given name has been used widely in the English-speaking world, not just by those with Scottish connections.

en.lifeSummary: When Sir Malcolm Drummond -Earl Of Mar was born in 1347, in Cargill, Perthshire, Scotland, his father, John Drummond, was 29 and his mother, Mary Margaret Montefichet, was 17. He married Lady Isabell Douglas Countess of Mar in 1388, in Scotland, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 1 daughter. He registered for military service in 1388. He died in 1403, in Scotland, at the age of 56, and was buried in Scotland.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Sir Malcolm Drummond -Earl Of Mar est né en 1347, à Cargill, Perthshire, Écosse, son père, John Drummond, avait 29 ans et sa mère, Mary Margaret Montefichet, avait 17 ans. Il a épousé Lady Isabell Douglas Countess of Mar en 1388, à Écosse, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fille. Il s'est inscrite au service militaire en 1388. Il est décédé en 1403, à Écosse, à l’âge de 56 ans, et a été enterré à Écosse.

de.lifeSummary: Als Sir Malcolm Drummond -Earl Of Mar 1347 in Cargill, Perthshire, Scotland geboren wurde, war sein Vater John Drummond 29 und seine Mutter Mary Margaret Montefichet 17. Er hat 1388 in Schottland, United Kingdom Lady Isabell Douglas Countess of Mar geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Tochter. Er hat sich 1388 zum Militärdienst angemeldet. Er starb 1403 im Alter von 56 Jahren in Scotland und wurde in Scotland begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Sir Malcolm Drummond -Earl Of Mar è nato il nel 1347 nel Cargill, Perthshire, Scotland, il suo padre, John Drummond, aveva 29 anni e il suo madre, Mary Margaret Montefichet, aveva 17 anni. Lui sposato Lady Isabell Douglas Countess of Mar nel 1388, nel Scozia, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlia. Si è arruolato nell'esercito nel 1388. Morì nel 1403, nel Scotland, all'età di 56 anni, e fu sepolto a Scotland.

ja.lifeSummary: Sir Malcolm Drummond -Earl Of Marが1347年にスコットランドペルスシュアイアカージルで生まれた時，父John Drummondは29歳，母Mary Margaret Montefichetは17歳であった。1388年にイギリススコットランドでLady Isabell Douglas Countess of Marと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の娘の親であった。彼は1388年に兵役登録をした。彼は1403年にスコットランドで56歳で死去し，スコットランドにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Sir Malcolm Drummond -Earl Of Mar(이)가 1347년 스컷랜드 퍼스실르 카르길에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 John Drummond(은)는 29세였고, 그의 어머니 Mary Margaret Montefichet(은)는 17세였다. 그는 1388년 영국 스코틀랜드에서 Lady Isabell Douglas Countess of Mar(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1388년에 군복무를 위해 등록했다. 그는 1403년 스컷랜드에서 56세의 나이로 사망했으며 스컷랜드에 묻혔다.

mn.Perth, , Perthshire, Scotland: Perth, Siorrachd Pheairt, Шотланд, Нэгдсэн Вант Улс

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Sir Malcolm Drummond -Earl Of Mar nasceu em 1347, em Cargill, Perthshire, Scotland, seu pai, John Drummond, tinha 29 anos e sua mãe, Mary Margaret Montefichet, tinha 17 anos. Ele casou-se com Lady Isabell Douglas Countess of Mar em 1388, em Escócia, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filha. Ele alistou-se no serviço militar em 1388. Ele faleceu em 1403, em Scotland, com 56 anos, e foi sepultado em Scotland.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Sir Malcolm Drummond -Earl Of Mar родился в 1347 г. в местности каргилл, пиртшир, Шотландия, его отцу по имени John Drummond было 29 лет, а матери, которую звали Mary Margaret Montefichet, 17. Он женился на женщине по имени Lady Isabell Douglas Countess of Mar в 1388 г. в местности Шотландия, Великобритания. У них была по крайней мере 1 дочь. В 1388 году он поступил на военную службу. Он умер в 1403 г. в местности Шотландия в возрасте 56 лет и был похоронен в местности Шотландия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Sir Malcolm Drummond -Earl Of Mar nació en 1347, en Cargill, Perthshire, Scotland, su papá, John Drummond, tenía 29 años y su mamá, Mary Margaret Montefichet, tenía 17 años. Se casó con Lady Isabell Douglas Countess of Mar en 1388, en Escocia, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hija. Se enlistó en el ejército en 1388. Murió en 1403, en Scotland, a la edad de 56 años, y fue sepultado en Scotland.
